title: Ingot UI
description: A resource pack inspired by the upcoming OreUI
body:
## 📝 Description IngotUI modernizes and beautifies Minecraft’s classic interfaces, drawing inspiration from the upcoming OreUI while staying true to the game’s original style. The pack aims to redesign every GUI, giving each container a cleaner, more appealing look. All interfaces have been updated with a focus on consistency and visual polish, without losing the vanilla feel. A key feature is the color-matched GUIs, where elements like shulker boxes adapt their interface color based on their variant. Future updates will introduce animated elements, further enhancing immersion while maintaining a cohesive and familiar Minecraft aesthetic.

This pack requires OptiFine or OptiGUI to work properly.

What has been completed!

## 💡 Inspiration - All GUIs are based off of the block that they correspond to - [AR's OreUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui) by amongstreality - [Re-colourful Containers GUI + HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) by Vi_Tul - [Colourful Containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui) by Kingybu - [Ore UI-ify](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oreui-ify) by BoardSodie - [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) by amongstreality - [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) by Vixel - [Colorful OreUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colouful-ore-ui) by MrGamingLoons - OreUI by Mojang Studios ## ⚙️ Technical specifications * Supported Minecraft version: **26.1 and below** * Dependencies: [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/home) or [**Optigui**](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) * Resolution: **16x**

With this resource pack, **YOU MAY**: - modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, you cannot share it publicly. - include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live, blog posts. - use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content only if the edited version is not publicly available. - remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack if credit is given. - earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack. With this resource pack, **YOU MAY NOT**: - redistribute this pack. - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition, Minecraft Dungeon, Minecraft Legends. - include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator. - include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission.
